name: MoneyGram
description_short: In Albuquerque, NM, MoneyGram at 1521 Eubank Blvd NE offers check cashing and money transfers for residents.
description_long:
Located at 1521 Eubank Blvd NE in northeast Albuquerque, NM, this MoneyGram location is a standalone facility serving the Eubank corridor. The site is open weekdays from 9 AM to 7 PM and Saturdays from 9 AM to 6 PM, making it convenient for working residents and weekend needs. On Sundays the location is closed, so plan accordingly.

This Albuquerque MoneyGram offers check cashing, money transfers, and related services. For specific questions about accepted check types, transfer limits, or fees, call 505-296-2114 to speak with staff.

If you're an Albuquerque resident needing to cash a check or send money, bring a valid government ID and be prepared to provide account information for transfers. This location serves walk-in customers throughout northeast Albuquerque.
pros: Extensive retail partner network with 37+ locations in Albuquerque alone (CVS, Walmart, Ace Cash Express, currency exchanges)
Extended business hours at many partner locations, including evening and weekend access
Ability to send and receive money both online and in person at physical locations
International transfer capability for remittances across multiple countries
Multiple partner types (drugstores, supermarkets, specialty currency exchange shops) provide flexible access options
Money order services available at most partner locations
Bill payment services integrated into the transfer platform
cons: No company-owned locations—service quality and customer experience depend on individual retail partners
Transfer fees and exchange rates for international transfers not transparent on location page
Limited ability to control service quality or file complaints directly with MoneyGram at retail partner locations
Requires visiting a physical location or managing online transfers separately for in-person cash pickup
Partner location hours vary significantly, limiting reliability for time-sensitive transfers
best_for: Customers needing domestic or international money transfers with flexible pickup options
Unbanked or underbanked individuals who prefer retail-based financial services
People sending remittances internationally to family members abroad
Customers needing bill payment or money order services outside standard banking hours
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked consumers, international remitters, and anyone needing flexible-hours access to money transfer services through a retail partner network. The main caveat is that service quality varies by individual partner location, and fees for transfers—particularly international ones—should be verified before committing to a transfer.
services: Cash pickup at retail partner locations
In-person transfer processing at partner locations
meta_description: Albuquerque's MoneyGram at 1521 Eubank Blvd NE, NM. Check cashing and money transfers.
